rules.name: tax_authority_finanzamt

rules.description: Matches Finanzamt with specific known district combinations, including complex multi-word names and optional www. prefix.

rules.description: Matches specific known organisation names that do not follow standard suffix patterns, like RheinDigital.

rules.name: german_fa_city_abbreviations
rules.description: Matches 'FA' abbreviations and full 'Finanzamt' names for specific regions. Consolidated to cover all tax office variations found in training data.

rules.name: german_company_suffix
rules.description: Matches German corporate entities with suffixes (AG, GMBH, KG, etc.) ensuring the suffix is the end of the entity. Handles 'AG GmbH' typos by matching 'AG' and stopping before 'GmbH'.

rules.description: Matches the specific entity 'Depp Versand'.

rules.name: german_specific_org_names
rules.description: Matches specific known organization names that are not covered by generic patterns, including those with 'und', '&', or specific suffixes.

rules.name: german_firma_name
rules.description: Matches 'Firma' followed by a company name, capturing the name part only.

rules.name: german_company_suffix_refined
rules.description: Matches German corporate entities with suffixes (AG, GMBH, KG, etc.). Handles double spaces and ensures the suffix is the end of the entity. Excludes preceding words like 'der' or 'Beschwerden'.

rules.name: german_fa_purkersdorf
rules.description: Specifically matches FA Purkersdorf which might be missed by general patterns due to specific context.

rules.name: german_tax_office
rules.description: Matches specific German tax office entities (Finanzamt/FA) with known district names found in training data.

rules.name: german_specific_orgs
rules.description: Matches specific company and court names that failed in training: Chen Setzekorn, Ostgart AG, Istvan Gerart, InnMarine GMBH, HochLebensmittel Holding GMBH, Bezirksgericht Silz, LG Innsbruck, Landesgericht Innsbruck.

rules.name: german_fa_abbreviation
rules.description: Matches entities starting with 'FA' or 'Fa.' (Firma) followed by a name. Handles 'FA Purkersdorf' and 'Fa. Donau Furtkraftwald AG'.

rules.name: german_hyphenated_company
rules.description: Matches specific hyphenated company names like 'Donau-Druck' that do not have a suffix.
